dialogue: Aw geez, I-I saw you pick your nose three times during that meeting. Th-that's going straight in— I mean— oh man, I didn't say anything, forget I said anything.
Holy crap, you just spent forty-five minutes scrolling Instagram while telling your boss you were 'reviewing the sprint backlog.' I'm literally watching you, man. I can't un-watch you.
Uh, hey— I-I don't know how to say this, but you talk to yourself when you code. Like full conversations. With hand gestures. Just thought you should know someone's keeping a-a-a log.
